business_definition: Total count of unique Organization Determinations.
dax_expression: COUNTROWS(FactObservation)

business_definition: Percentage of determinations that resulted in adverse decisions.
dax_expression: DIVIDE(CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactObservation), FactObservation[disposition] = "Adverse"), [Total Org Determinations Override], 0)

business_definition: Average turnaround time for organization determinations in days.
dax_expression: DIVIDE(SUM(FactObservation[determination_key]), 2, 0)
DIVIDE(CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactObservation), FactObservation[is_clean_claim] = TRUE), COUNTROWS(FactObservation), 0)

business_definition: Percentage of records missing key identifying fields.
dax_expression: DIVIDE(CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactObservation), ISBLANK(FactObservation[od_number])), COUNTROWS(FactObservation), 0)

business_definition: Total count of validation warnings or errors in data.
dax_expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactObservation), FactObservation[were_internal_plan_criteria_applied] = FALSE)

business_definition: Composite score representing data completeness and validation rate.
dax_expression: 0.98 - DIVIDE([Validation Errors], COUNTROWS(FactObservation), 0)
[Data Quality Score]
